title: Finite Resorce CraftIng Recipies
description:
A Mod that Makes All Resources 
There are no links because I do not have a reason to add a link and I just do not want to add one
body:
The reson I think you should download this mod is because you can get infinate netherite and you do not have to if you dont want to but I think you migt want it. Also sorry for my bad spelling. Also you can get unlimted dragon eggs in a world witch is fun.
I may add spawn egg recipes if people like this mod.
